# terrible_cisco_meraki_networks_wireless_rf_profiles (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `apBandSettings` (String) Settings that will be enabled if selectionType is set to 'ap'.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bandSelectionType` (String) Band selection can be set to either 'ssid' or 'ap'. This param is required on creation.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `clientBalancingEnabled` (Boolean) Steers client to best available access point. Can be either true or false. Defaults to true.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fiveGhzSettings` (String) Settings related to 5Ghz band.
- `flexRadios` (String) Flex radio settings.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `isIndoorDefault` (Boolean) Set this profile as the default indoor rf profile. If the profile ID is one of 'indoor' or 'outdoor', then a new profile will be created from the respective ID and set as the default.
- `isOutdoorDefault` (Boolean) Set this profile as the default outdoor rf profile. If the profile ID is one of 'indoor' or 'outdoor', then a new profile will be created from the respective ID and set as the default.
- `minBitrateType` (String) Minimum bitrate can be set to either 'band' or 'ssid'. Defaults to band.
- `name` (String) The name of the new profile. Must be unique. This param is required on creation.
- `networkId` (String) NetworkId path parameter. Network ID.
- `perSsidSettings` (String) Per-SSID radio settings by number.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `rfProfileId` (String) RfProfileId path parameter. Rf profile ID.
- `sixGhzSettings` (String) Settings related to 6Ghz band. Only applicable to networks with 6Ghz capable APs.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `transmission` (String) Settings related to radio transmission.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `twoFourGhzSettings` (String) Settings related to 2.4Ghz band.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `meraki_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco Meraki Python SDK
